message:
fix: capture Drizzle query.limit() return value in listApprovals

Drizzle ORM's .limit() method returns a new query builder rather than
mutating the existing one. The original code discarded this return value,
causing pagination to return all results instead of the limited amount.

Changed `const query` to `let query` and properly captured the return
value with `query = query.limit(options.limit) as typeof query`.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
